series.title: Cosmo Mickey
series.tagline:
This is a story about a boy destined to destroy the entire world.
A young king who declared war on the entire galaxy plunges countless worlds into chaos — bringing extermination to races and the gifted.

Around a boy named Mikey, who lived a lonely life and had no idea he would be drawn into a conflict of cosmic proportions.

A cosmic drama of revenge, love, and suffering.
Immerse yourself in a magnificent tale of different planets and their inhabitants.
